title: mirabilis grandiflora
intro: Mirabilis grandiflora, also known as the American four o'clock plant, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides in its leaves and roots. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis grandiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
